A B C E F G H I L N O P R S T U V

T

text() - Method in class high.mackenzie.snowflake.AbstractTreeNode
This method returns the text from the matched region of input that this node covers.
text() - Method in interface high.mackenzie.snowflake.ITreeNode
This method returns the text from the matched region of input that this node covers.
toString() - Method in class high.mackenzie.snowflake.AbstractTreeNode
toString() - Method in interface high.mackenzie.snowflake.ITreeNode
trace() - Method in class high.mackenzie.snowflake.ParserOutput
This method returns a record describing stages of the parsing-attempt.
Trace - Class in high.mackenzie.snowflake
An instance of this class is the output of a tracer that records match-attempts.
Trace(List<TraceElement>, int) - Constructor for class high.mackenzie.snowflake.Trace
Sole Constructor.
TraceElement - Class in high.mackenzie.snowflake
An instance of this class describes either the entry or exit of a match attempt.
TraceElementReason - Enum in high.mackenzie.snowflake
These constants indicate the reasons why a trace-element was created.
Tracer - Class in high.mackenzie.snowflake
An instance of this class facilitates the recording of a bounded number of match attempts.
TreeNode - Class in high.mackenzie.snowflake
An instance of this class is a node in the parse-tree data-structure created via parsing.
TreeNode() - Constructor for class high.mackenzie.snowflake.TreeNode
